business_ideas.idea: Electric Sheep: robot lawn mower that buys landscaping businesses as testing ground for autonomous tech.
Sweetgreen Infinite Kitchen: robots dispense ingredients, make bowls 2.5x faster than humans, 500/hour capacity.
Kernel (Steve Ells): plant-based vegan bowl concept with robotic dispensing and mixing equipment.
Pizza bot: robotic pizza maker for chain deployment (Dominos, Pizza Hut). Softbank invested hundreds of millions.
OpenAI alternative to Google via AI: AI agents will reduce need for traditional search.

predictions.text: In 10 years, most restaurants will be robot-operated, not human-staffed.
Single-purpose robots (lawn mowers, kitchen automation) will deploy before general humanoid robots.
